title: Old Damage/Fall Damage Sounds
description: This resource pack brings back the short-lived Player hurt sounds and "crunch" fall damage sounds from Minecraft 1.0.0 - 1.3.2. These sounds were also used in the Legacy Console Versions.
body:
--THIS IS NOT THE STEVE "OOF" SOUND--

This resource pack brings back the short-lived Player hurt sounds and "crunch" fall damage sounds from Minecraft 1.0.0 - 1.3.2. These sounds were also used in the Legacy Console Versions.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- Works for all damage sources (fire, berry bush, drowning, etc..) except powder snow freezing.
  
- FallSmall/Fallbig1/Fallbig2 damage sounds apply to mobs too.
  
- Fallbig1 and Fallbig2 have a 50/50 chance to play. Accurate to when these sounds were in the game.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

---RESOURCE PACK DEMONSTRATION---
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0GSLnhAEJ6k
